Collapsed Admonitions Test

Regular expanded admonition:

true

"Expanded Note"

This is an expanded note.

Collapsed admonition:

true

"Collapsed Note"

This is a collapsed note.

Both types together:

true

"Expanded Info"

Regular expanded info admonition.

 true

"Collapsed Warning"

This is a collapsed warning admonition.

Nested collapsed:

true

"Outer Note"

This contains a nested collapsed admonition.

true

"Inner Collapsed Tip"

This is nested inside.
